title: The Son of Caesar and Cleopatra
writer: Anacleto Fontini, Ferdinando Baldi, Franco Airaldi
actors: Mark Damon, Scilla Gabel, Arnoldo Foà
plot: In Roman-dominated Egypt, the corrupt administration of a governor named Petronius has sparked a revolt headed by El Kabir, a young man who learns that he's actually the son of Cleopatra and Julius Caesar. When Petronius' daughter...
